test-case.description: accepts -Arch amd64
test-case.name: build-winpe.ps1 parameter validation.accepts -Arch amd64

test-case.description: accepts -Arch arm64
test-case.name: build-winpe.ps1 parameter validation.accepts -Arch arm64

test-case.description: rejects unknown -Arch values
test-case.name: build-winpe.ps1 parameter validation.rejects unknown -Arch values

test-case.description: emits a manifest path to stdout when -DryRun is set
test-case.name: build-winpe.ps1 parameter validation.emits a manifest path to stdout when -DryRun is set

test-case.description: returns the parsed config from a JSON file
test-case.name: Read-AgentConfig.returns the parsed config from a JSON file

test-case.description: throws on missing file
test-case.name: Read-AgentConfig.throws on missing file

test-case.description: appends to the log file with a timestamp prefix
test-case.name: Write-AgentLog.appends to the log file with a timestamp prefix

test-case.description: returns uuid and mac from injected resolvers
test-case.name: Get-VMIdentity.returns uuid and mac from injected resolvers

test-case.description: normalizes uuid to lowercase
test-case.name: Get-VMIdentity.normalizes uuid to lowercase

test-case.description: throws when resolver returns empty
test-case.name: Get-VMIdentity.throws when resolver returns empty

test-case.description: sends a POST with bearer header when token provided
test-case.name: Invoke-OrchestratorRequest.sends a POST with bearer header when token provided

test-case.description: omits bearer header when token is null
test-case.name: Invoke-OrchestratorRequest.omits bearer header when token is null

test-case.description: falls back to FallbackBaseUrl when BaseUrl exhausts retries
test-case.name: Invoke-OrchestratorRequest.falls back to FallbackBaseUrl when BaseUrl exhausts retries

test-case.description: retries on transient failure up to MaxAttempts then throws
test-case.name: Invoke-OrchestratorRequest.retries on transient failure up to MaxAttempts then throws

test-case.description: runs each action and refreshes the bearer token from step results
test-case.name: Invoke-ActionLoop.runs each action and refreshes the bearer token from step results

test-case.description: aborts the loop on handler failure and posts state=error
test-case.name: Invoke-ActionLoop.aborts the loop on handler failure and posts state=error

test-case.description: fails fast when no handler is registered for a kind
test-case.name: Invoke-ActionLoop.fails fast when no handler is registered for a kind

test-case.description: emits a diskpart script with Recovery before C: for layout=recovery_before_c
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-PartitionDisk.emits a diskpart script with Recovery before C: for layout=recovery_before_c

test-case.description: rejects unknown layout values
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-PartitionDisk.rejects unknown layout values

test-case.description: invokes dism /apply-image with index resolved by metadata name
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-ApplyWim.invokes dism /apply-image with index resolved by metadata name

test-case.description: throws on dism non-zero exit
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-ApplyWim.throws on dism non-zero exit

test-case.description: invokes dism /add-driver against the VirtIO ISO root with /recurse
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-InjectDrivers.invokes dism /add-driver against the VirtIO ISO root with /recurse

test-case.description: throws when the VirtIO source cannot be located
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-InjectDrivers.throws when the VirtIO source cannot be located

test-case.description: passes when all required INFs are present
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-ValidateBootDrivers.passes when all required INFs are present

test-case.description: throws listing every missing INF
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-ValidateBootDrivers.throws listing every missing INF

test-case.description: extracts the leaf INF name from each "Original File Name" line
test-case.name: _GetInjectedDriverInfs (parses dism /Format:List output).extracts the leaf INF name from each "Original File Name" line

test-case.description: fetches /winpe/autopilot-config and writes it to V:\Windows\Provisioning\Autopilot
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-StageAutopilotConfig.fetches /winpe/autopilot-config and writes it to V:\Windows\Provisioning\Autopilot

test-case.description: creates the directory tree if missing
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-StageAutopilotConfig.creates the directory tree if missing

test-case.description: invokes bcdboot V:\Windows /s S: /f UEFI
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-BakeBootEntry.invokes bcdboot V:\Windows /s S: /f UEFI

test-case.description: throws on non-zero exit
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-BakeBootEntry.throws on non-zero exit

test-case.description: fetches /winpe/unattend and writes V:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-StageUnattend.fetches /winpe/unattend and writes V:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml

test-case.description: invokes Get-WindowsAutopilotInfo, parses CSV, and POSTs to /winpe/hash
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-CaptureHash.invokes Get-WindowsAutopilotInfo, parses CSV, and POSTs to /winpe/hash

test-case.description: throws when the capture script fails
test-case.name: Invoke-Action-CaptureHash.throws when the capture script fails

test-case.description: registers, runs the action loop, calls /winpe/done, then reboots
test-case.name: Start-AutopilotWinPE.registers, runs the action loop, calls /winpe/done, then reboots
